mapper.select: select db, system, env, dbtype, dbuser, null as pwd, hostname, port, id_type, id, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidatabase order by db desc
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piidatabase (db, system, env, dbtype, dbuser, pwd, hostname, port, id_type, id, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{env, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dbtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dbuser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{port, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piidatabase (db, system, env, dbtype, dbuser, pwd, hostname, port, id_type, id, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{env, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dbtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dbuser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{port, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select db, system, env, dbtype, dbuser, pwd, hostname, port, id_type, id, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidatabase where db= #{db}

select db, system, env, dbtype, dbuser, pwd, hostname, port, id_type, id, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidatabase where db= #{db}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piidatabase set system= #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, env= #{env, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dbtype= #{dbtype}, dbuser= #{dbuser}, pwd= #{pwd}, hostname= #{hostname}, port= #{port}, id_type= #{id_type}, id= #{id}, comments= #{comments}, upddate= SYSDATE, upduserid= #{upduserid} where db= #{db}

update cotdl.tbl_piidatabase set system= #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, env= #{env, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dbtype= #{dbtype}, dbuser= #{dbuser}, hostname= #{hostname}, port= #{port}, id_type= #{id_type}, id= #{id}, comments= #{comments}, upddate= SYSDATE, upduserid= #{upduserid} where db= #{db}
